response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with experience in distributed systems, cloud technologies, and open-source contributions. However, the role requires deep C++ expertise (8+ years) and a focus on cloud compute platforms, which are not prominently featured in his resume. His leadership and mentoring experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps engineering.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems and infrastructure (e.g., microservices at Sociomantic, Kubernetes at GISCollective).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks (e.g., Selenium Course, Refactoring Dojos).
Diverse technical background with contributions to open-source projects and tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial).
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of C++ experience; most recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang.
Limited explicit experience with cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture.
Technical leadership roles are not clearly aligned with cloud/DevOps mentorship (preferred qualification).
